page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Iva is a de novo assembler designed to assemble virus genomes that have no repeat sequences, using illumina read pairs sequenced from mixed populations at extremely high and variable depth.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: IVA is a de novo assembler designed to assemble virus genomes that have no repeat sequences, using Illumina read pairs sequenced from mixed populations at extremely high and variable depth.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: IVA is a de novo assembler designed to assemble virus genomes that have no repeat sequences, using Illumina read pairs sequenced from mixed populations at extremely high and variable depth.
